# Ernest Of Gaia — AI Coaching

Ernest Of Gaia is a local AI coaching business serving Pacific City to
Portland Metro, Oregon.

## Contact

- Email: eog@ErnestOfGaia.xyz
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/ernestofgaia

- Website: https://ernestofgaia.xyz

## Services
- 1-on-1 AI Coaching (personalized sessions)
- Custom AI Plans (tailored workflows and prompt systems)
- On-Site Visits (Pacific City to Portland Metro)

## About
Ernest Of Gaia helps individuals master prompt engineering and AI lifecycle
automation through personalized, holistic 1-on-1 coaching.

Tagline: "AI, Explained Like a Human"

## Service area
Pacific City, Oregon to Portland Metro, Oregon.
